race.comment: Looks a bit more open than the early market would suggest. BACASH (1) was very good at a big quote first up at Flemington, just run down late in Listed company to be beaten a head. He was very consistent in those second-tier races through the Spring and 1200m around here should suit nicely. OLIVEANOTHERDAY (6) has bolted in with both runs this time in at short odds. He's beaten very little but the margins and SP's are saying he's right up to this company. BURMA STAR (3) got home well at Flemington fresh behind Legacy Bound and should improve to 1200m with Zahra on. VIVID SUN (9) was good fresh against her own sex, staying at 1200m is a little niggle though.
